description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the yottadb/yottadb-base:latest-master Docker image and runs a global before_script which updates apt, installs wget ca-certificates git g++ gcc libc6-dev make pkg-config, sets GOPROXY, GOPATH, GOBIN, adds them to PATH, downloads Go ${GOLANG_VERSION} tarball, extracts it, prints go version, sets ydb_dist to /opt/yottadb/current and creates an artifacts directory. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add: (1) v1_unit_tests (extends .unit_tests) that runs `export YDB_GO_SKIP_TIMED_TESTS="yes"`, `cd ${TEST_VERSION}`, `go get -t`, fetches the latest Go version, loops over TEST_GO_VERSIONS (1.18.10 latest), installs each go$ver, runs `go$ver test -v`, copies any /tmp/ydbgo* and m_routines files to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/artifacts/go$ver, and finally runs `go$ver test -bench . -short -timeout 60s -benchtime 0.1s`; (2) v2_unit_tests (extends .unit_tests) with the same script plus creating a temporary directory, setting ydb_gbldir, initializing a Mumps database with $ydb_dist/mumps and mupip, running `go run test/wordfreq.go <test/wordfreq_input.txt | diff - test/wordfreq_output.txt` and `go run test/pseudoBank.go --timeout=2 --verbose`, then cleaning the temp directory; both unit test jobs produce artifacts in the artifacts/ path that expire in 7 days. Also in test stage add commit-verify (image ubuntu:24.04) with its own before_script installing git wget gnupg, then `wget https://gitlab.com/YottaDB/DB/YDB/-/raw/master/ci/commit_verify.sh`, `chmod +x commit_verify.sh`, and `./commit_verify.sh scripts/needs_copyright.sh https://gitlab.com/YottaDB/Lang/YDBGo`; add error_codes job that runs `go generate` followed by `git diff --exit-code error_codes.go || (echo "There is a difference between the latest YottaDB master and the currently committed error_codes.go, please run 'go generate' and commit error_codes.go" && exit 1)`; add lint_code job that runs `go install honnef.co/go/tools/cmd/staticcheck@latest`, `staticcheck -checks inherit,-ST1017,-SA4006,-S1006,-S1005,-S1000,-S1008`, and `(cd v2; staticcheck -checks -SA1019)`; add race_detector job that runs `go get -t`, `go test -v -race`, `go test -v -asan` for v1 and `go get -C v2 -t`, `go test -C v2 -v -race`, `go test -C v2 -v -asan`; add v1_coverage job with variable TEST_VERSION='.' that creates $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cover/${TEST_VERSION}, runs `go get -C ${TEST_VERSION} -t`, `go test -C ${TEST_VERSION} -covermode=count -coverprofile "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/cover/${TEST_VERSION}/coverage.cov"`, generates coverage reports with `go tool -C ${TEST_VERSION} cover -func=...` and `go tool -C ${TEST_VERSION} cover -html=... -o ...`, installs gocover-cobertura and converts the .cov file to Cobertura XML, storing artifacts (coverage.cov, coverage.html, coverage.xml) for 2 years and exposing a coverage regex; add v2_coverage job with TEST_VERSION='v2' that runs `make -C ${TEST_VERSION} coverage`, installs gocover-cobertura, converts coverage.cov to XML, and stores similar artifacts for 2 years. In the build stage add build job that runs `go build -v` and `go build -C v2 -v`. In the deploy stage add pages job that runs `mkdir $CI_PROJECT_DIR/public` and `mv cover/coverage.html $CI_PROJECT_DIR/public/`, publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact (expire 30 days), depends on v1_coverage and v2_coverage, and runs only on the master branch. No caches are defined.
